summary: Testing completed for DynoPay UI bug fixes - NewHeader logo navigation and ReferralCard overflow fixes. Code analysis confirms fixes are correctly implemented but testing limited by authentication requirements.

integration_issues.issue: Logo still navigates to homepage (/) instead of dashboard on public pages
integration_issues.note: Different component than the one that was fixed (NewHeader)

testing_limitations.issue: Cannot test NewHeader component fixes without authentication
testing_limitations.reason: Components only render on authenticated dashboard pages (/dashboard, /wallet, /transactions)
testing_limitations.workaround: Code review confirms fixes are correctly implemented

passed_tests: All protected pages redirect to login (expected behavior)
HomeHeader logo navigation works (navigates to homepage as designed)
Mobile responsiveness works on all tested pages
No JavaScript errors on any tested pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Code review confirms NewHeader fixes are correctly implemented. However, HomeHeader component on public pages still navigates to '/' instead of '/dashboard'. Consider if this needs to be unified. Testing of actual dashboard NewHeader and ReferralCard requires authentication - fixes appear correct in code but need manual verification by authenticated user.
